name: ExtensionMeasure_Term
title: R5: Defined terms used in the measure documentation (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Measure.term` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Measure.term` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Measure.term` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Measure.term` has a context of Measure based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Measure`.
Element `Measure.term` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
